articles.author: Inaya Folarin Iman
articles.title: France becomes first European Union country to ban social media for kids under 15 - CBS News
articles.description: As lawmakers approve a social media ban on kids and phones in high schools, Macron says France is "leading the way in Europe when it comes to protecting our children."
articles.content:
France has become the first country in the European Union to ban social media for children under the age of 15, after its parliament overwhelmingly approved landmark legislation by 279 votes to 81.
